messages.content: You are an incident triage assistant. Respond in 5 concise bullets max.

Summarize this alert for the on-call engineer: Payment API p95 latency rose from 420ms to 1480ms in the last 10 minutes. Checkout success rate dipped from 98.8% to 94.9%. No data loss indicators. Recent deploy: pricing-cache refresh worker at 03:20 UTC.
